SEARCH
Package com.nib.supernaut

Class AbstractOnlineProgram

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.AbstractProgram
com.nib.supernaut.AbstractOnlineProgram
Direct Known Subclasses:
CtgServerProgram, DFHADMIN, DFHCESN, DFHENV, DFHPAGE, DFHPING
public abstract class AbstractOnlineProgram extends AbstractProgram
Represents an abstract online program for processing transactions or specific logic in an online context. This class is intended to provide a base structure for handling transaction or programming logic with integration to the provided context and Supernaut execution framework. It extends the AbstractProgram to incorporate methods and properties defined by the underlying framework. The class defines an abstraction for processing transactions via the procedure method, which must be implemented by subclasses. Key responsibilities and features: - Provides a protected reference to the SupernautContext, the Supernaut context for executing online operations. - Offers functionality to retrieve the DFHEIBLK control block, used in transaction processing. - Defines an interface, ISectionDelegate, to encapsulate operations that can throw specific exceptions. - Enforces implementation of the abstract method procedure(AbstractNField dfhcommarea) for specific transaction logic.

  • Field Details

    • supernaut

      protected final SupernautContext supernaut
      A reference to the SupernautContext that serves as the execution framework for this online program.

      The SupernautContext provides the underlying context required for executing transaction logic and accessing system-level features necessary for operation, such as control blocks and runtime environment details. It is initialized during the construction of the containing class and is immutable thereafter.

      This variable allows the program to interact with the Supernaut framework to execute online operations, retrieve control structures, and manage execution flow.

    • dfheiblk

      protected final Dfheiblk dfheiblk
      Represents the DFHEIBLK (Definition of the CICS Task Control Area) control block used by the online program to interact with CICS. This variable provides access to key information related to the current task or transaction being processed. DFHEIBLK is a core control structure in CICS (Customer Information Control System), containing fields that define execution details for the running task, such as terminal information, attention keys, communication areas, and more. This variable is initialized during the construction of the class based on the context provided by the Supernaut execution framework using getDfheiblk(). It is immutable after initialization and allows the containing program to interact with the underlying execution environment at a lower level. Key roles: - Acts as a centralized control block for accessing task-related data. - Facilitates integration of CICS transaction logic into the program. - Provides context-specific details for handling terminal input/output and other operational needs during transaction processing.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractOnlineProgram

      public AbstractOnlineProgram(Context context)
      Constructs an instance of the containing class with a reference to the Supernaut context.

    • procedure

      protected abstract int procedure(AbstractNField dfhcommarea) throws ContextException
      Abstract method that must be implemented by subclasses to define specific transaction logic.
      Parameters:
      dfhcommarea - the transaction COMMAREA
      Returns:
      the exit code for the transaction
      Throws:
      ContextException - if an error occurs while processing the transaction

    • procedure

      protected int procedure(AbstractNField... args) throws ContextException
      Executes the procedure logic using the provided arguments.
      Specified by:
      procedure in class AbstractProgram
      Parameters:
      args - An array of AbstractNField objects representing the input arguments for the procedure.
      Returns:
      The exit status code of the procedure execution.
      Throws:
      ContextException - If an error occurs during the execution of the procedure.
